description_long: This is a male adult figure dressed in a military-style uniform, featuring a belted jacket with multiple pockets, cargo pants, and sturdy boots. The figure wears a rounded helmet and gloves, suggesting a protective or utilitarian purpose. The uniform is detailed with epaulets on the shoulders and a pouch attached to the belt, enhancing the functional appearance. The face is clean-shaven and expressionless, with no visible hair due to the helmet. The overall build is average, with a straight, upright posture and arms slightly extended outward. The attire and accessories indicate readiness for outdoor or potentially hazardous urban environments.
description: An adult male in a military-style uniform with helmet, gloves, cargo pants, and boots, standing upright and ready for action.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full uniform, helmet, gloves, boots, and facial features.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the helmet, jacket, and cargo pants.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the jacket, epaulets, belt pouch, and boots.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the side profile of the uniform and accessories.
attribute_clothing_type: military-style uniform with belted jacket, cargo pants, gloves, and helmet
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms slightly extended
